name: French Canadian Pea Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Salt pork, all in one piece
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and sort the peas, then soak them in cold water overnight.
2. Drain the peas and place them in a large pot with 8 cups of water.
3. Add salt pork, onion, celery, carrots, bay leaf, savory, and salt to the pot.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer until the peas are very tender (about 2 hours), adding more water if needed.
5. Remove the salt pork, chop it, and return it to the soup.
6. Discard the bay leaf.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
This recipe makes 8 servings.
